## v0.32.3 (2026-05-26) — Release

### Documentation
- document perf/reliability fixes — retry, health, backoff, TelegramError

### Other Changes
- fix(telegram): 3 robustness fixes from perf review (round 2)
- fix(telegram): 3 reliability fixes from perf review
- fix(telegram): defaultDocumentHandler MEDIA format — remove leaked filename
- feat(telegram): delete tool trace message after agent response
- feat(telegram): poller returns fatal errors (401/403/409) instead of retrying
- feat(telegram): add DeleteMessage API method
- feat(telegram): exponential backoff in poller error handling
- feat(telegram): add health HTTP endpoint for monitoring
- feat(telegram): add exponential backoff retry to doUpload
- feat(telegram): add exponential backoff retry to doJSON
- feat(telegram): add SendDocument + wire document media type in sendMedia
- feat(telegram): add document/file message support
- fix(telegram): route edited messages to same handler as new messages
- fix(telegram): add panic recovery to sendAsync goroutine
- fix(telegram): retry plain-text on all sendChunk failures + fallback message
- fix(telegram): send error messages to user when command/callback handlers fail
- feat(telegram): auto-cleanup downloaded media files after agent turn
- test(telegram): add test coverage for handleChatMessage panic recovery
- fix(telegram): prevent code block breakage during message chunking
- fix(llm): add retry with exponential backoff for transient API errors
- fix(telegram): add panic recovery to HandleUpdate and handleChatMessage
- fix(telegram): remove misleading placeholder command handlers
- fix(telegram): send ack when message is queued behind active agent run
- fix(telegram): download photos instead of passing opaque fileIDs
- fix(telegram): download voice messages instead of passing opaque fileID

## v0.44.1 (2026-05-26) — Session_search nil store panic

### Bug Fixes
- session_search nil store panic — graceful error instead of crash

### Documentation
- v0.44.1 changelog and version bump

### Other Changes
- fix(security): add $$ escape for literal dollar sign in config var expansion (M6)
- fix(security): memMsgIdx stale after trimContext drops the memory message (M5)
- fix(security): trim allowlist/denylist patterns to prevent config-side bypass (M4)
- fix(security): propagate parent context to delegate_tasks so sub-agents die on cancel (M3)
- fix(security): isPrivateHost SSRF bypass — proper IP parsing + RFC 6598 + IPv6 ULA + DNS resolution (M2)
- fix(security): skip symlinks in all filepath.Walk callbacks (M1)
- fix(security): Telegram stderr log 0644→0600 — world-readable file in /tmp
- fix(security): ClassifyURL SSRF bypass — proper IP parsing replaces string prefixes
- fix(security): O_NOFOLLOW for searchFilesTool.searchContent and glob tool binary-skip
